spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: Create an acidic bubble at a point within range; creatures in a 5-foot-radius sphere make a Dexterity save or take 1d6 acid damage.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.description: Make a melee spell attack channeling grave-cold energy; on a hit the target takes 1d10 necrotic damage and cannot regain hit points until the end of your next turn.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: Touch a willing creature and choose a skill; until the spell ends, the creature adds 1d4 to ability checks using that skill.

spells.name: Light
spells.description: Touch one Large or smaller unattended object to make it shed bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for 20 feet more; covering the object blocks the light.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.description: Create a spectral hand that can manipulate objects, open unlocked containers, and move up to 30 feet on later turns, but it cannot attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.description: Create either a simple sound or an image of an object no larger than a 5-foot cube; the illusion becomes faint to creatures that identify it with Investigation.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.description: Perform minor magical tricks such as sensory effects, small clean-or-soil effects, brief marks, tiny conjured trinkets, or lighting and snuffing small flames.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.description: Make a ranged spell attack against a creature or object; on a hit it takes 1d10 fire damage, and unattended flammable objects can ignite.

spells.name: Produce Flame
spells.description: A flame appears in your hand shedding light; until it ends you can hurl it with a Magic action as a ranged spell attack that deals 1d8 fire damage on a hit.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.description: A frigid beam streaks toward a creature; on a hit it takes 1d8 cold damage and its Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature you can see; it makes a Dexterity save or takes 1d8 radiant damage, gaining no benefit from half or three-quarters cover for the save.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.description: Make a melee spell attack charged with lightning; on a hit the target takes 1d8 lightning damage and cannot make opportunity attacks until the start of its next turn.

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.description: Create a minor supernatural effect such as a booming voice, flickering flames, briefly opening or shutting doors and windows, strange sounds, or harmless tremors.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.description: Guided by magical insight, make one weapon attack using your spellcasting ability for the attack and damage rolls; the damage can be radiant or the weapon's normal damage type.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.description: Launch a crackling beam of magical force as a ranged spell attack, with additional beams gained at higher character levels.

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.description: Unleash magically laced insults at one creature that can see or hear you; on a failed Wisdom save it takes 1d6 psychic damage and has disadvantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn.
